summary: PDF Layout Fixes testing completed successfully. All 22 backend tests pass (2 skipped for enterprise routes due to missing data). All PDF preview endpoints verified working with correct layout constraints. Key fixes verified: 1) Page width 794px with overflow:hidden, 2) Auth-area (signature+stamp) now appears on ALL document types (Quote, Invoice, Order) when enabled in settings, 3) table-layout:fixed on items-table, 4) doc-title max-width:280px, 5) totals-box inside page container.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF layout fixes complete. All document types (Quote, Invoice, Order) now have: 794px page width, overflow:hidden, table-layout:fixed, doc-title max-width:280px, auth-area (signature+stamp) when enabled in settings. Enterprise PDF routes also have page constraints. Sample IDs: Quote=69c3deedabcf7cf39caa7e56, Invoice=69c264d851b9095b5b27a02c, Order=partner-my-orders

quote_preview_auth_area.details: Auth-area with signature and stamp blocks appears when enabled in settings

invoice_preview_auth_area.details: Auth-area with signature and stamp blocks appears when enabled

order_preview_auth_area.details: Auth-area NOW EXISTS on orders (was missing before) - KEY FIX VERIFIED

invoice_branding_settings.details: show_signature and show_stamp fields exist and can be toggled

auth_area_settings_driven.details: Auth-area appears when show_signature=true OR show_stamp=true, hidden when both false

enterprise_pdf_page_constraint.details: Enterprise PDF routes have .page { width: 794px; max-width: 100%; overflow: hidden; }
